name: The Disputed Zone — Fringe
descriptionSeed: The band of broken country where Harmonic and Radiant power fields interfere. Sound bends light here; light carries sound. Standing waves make pockets where time runs syrup-slow, and shimmer-vortices wander like dust devils made of noise and glare. Neither civilization claims it — officially. Both send people into it. Things live here that adapted to the interference, and things were left here during the Great Transition that never got collected.
encounterFlavor: Interference phenomena, scavengers and smugglers, adapted fauna, half-buried pre-Transition machinery, and rarely — very rarely — something that predates humanity noticing you.
